bugs_fixed_this_cycle.description: _update_hud() and _on_encounter_reached() referenced /root/GameManager (non-existent). Changed to _find_store() which correctly locates MerlinStore singleton. HUD now shows real life_essence and encounter damage/heal effects are applied.

overall_assessment: Bug hunt on cycle 5 files found 1 HIGH bug (dead GameManager reference in Forest3D scene). All store references now use _find_store(). 15 total bugs fixed across 6 cycles. PS1/CRT shader pipeline upgraded.
